items.definition_en: A pot is a container used for growing plants.
items.example_en: I put my new fern in a clay pot.

items.definition_en: A planter is a large container for holding plants or flowers.
items.example_en: There is a wooden planter on the balcony.

items.definition_en: A flower box is a long, narrow container for growing flowers.
items.example_en: She filled her flower box with colorful pansies.

items.definition_en: A hanging basket is a container that is hung up and used for plants.
items.example_en: The porch has a hanging basket full of petunias.

items.definition_en: A garden trough is a long, shallow container for plants.
items.example_en: Lettuce grows well in a garden trough.

items.definition_en: A window box is a container attached outside a window for flowers.
items.example_en: The window box is full of red geraniums.

items.definition_en: A tub is a round, open container for growing plants.
items.example_en: He planted strawberries in a large tub.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a round container with a handle, used for carrying or growing plants.
items.example_en: She used an old bucket to plant tomatoes.

items.definition_en: A basket is a container made of woven material to hold plants.
items.example_en: The basket by the door is full of flowers.

items.definition_en: A barrel planter is a cut barrel used for planting.
items.example_en: Lavender grows well in a barrel planter.

items.definition_en: A grow bag is a soft bag used as a container for growing plants.
items.example_en: Tomatoes thrive in a grow bag on the patio.

items.definition_en: A seed tray is a shallow container for planting seeds.
items.example_en: She started her vegetables in a seed tray.

items.definition_en: A cold frame is a low container with a glass cover for plants.
items.example_en: The lettuce seedlings are in the cold frame.

items.definition_en: A trough planter is a rectangular container for growing plants.
items.example_en: They placed a trough planter by the fence.

items.definition_en: A plant pot is a small container used to grow individual plants.
items.example_en: She bought a new plant pot for her cactus.

items.definition_en: A sand bucket is a small container, often used for planting by children.
items.example_en: He used a sand bucket to plant marigolds.

items.definition_en: A grow pot is a simple container where plants start to grow.
items.example_en: The herbs are in a black grow pot.

items.definition_en: A clay pot is a container made from clay for plants.
items.example_en: She prefers a clay pot for her succulents.

items.definition_en: A watering jar is a container used to water or hold small plants.
items.example_en: She keeps a watering jar near the seedlings.

items.definition_en: A self-watering pot is a container that helps water the plant automatically.
items.example_en: A self-watering pot makes plant care easier.
